title: testFailingPodmanService fails very often
body:
Yesterday we got several failures from upstream podman PRs, e.g. https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25277#issuecomment-2648960268 or https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25280#issuecomment-2649066873 or https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25281#issuecomment-2649105721 . The [failure](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/4711e915-f835-44f1-a67c-957b93e162aa/) always looks the same:

```
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/source/test/check-application", line 1650, in testFailingPodmanService
    b.click("#app .pf-v5-c-empty-state button")
[...] TimeoutError
```

The [screenshot](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/4711e915-f835-44f1-a67c-957b93e162aa/work-podman-misc7mhp8ph9/plans/cockpit-podman/podman-misc/execute/data/guest/default-0/test/browser/other-1/data/TestApplication-testFailingPodmanService-fedora-43-localhost-22-FAIL-1.png) shows that it's on the Services page, not on the podman page. This seems like a bug in the test itself, not a regression in rawhide. It also [happened on Fedora 41](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/091b71c1-07fb-498d-8b55-61dfcaba8398/)

This is urgent as it makes a lot of noise in podman.

comments.body: Meh, sorry -- I meant to file this in cockpit-podman of course!
